title: ExecutionRecord
description: Represents the record of an action that was executed after receiving a valid approval. An execution record must only be created after a valid, unexpired, unused ApprovalRecord has been verified. The execution_token_id links this record to the authorization chain.

execution_id.description: Unique identifier for this execution record.

request_id.description: The request_id of the ActionRequest that was executed. Must match the request_id on the linked ApprovalRecord.

approval_id.description: The approval_id of the ApprovalRecord that authorized this execution. Must reference a valid, unexpired, and previously unused approval.

executed_by.description: Identifier of the agent, service, or system that performed the execution.

executed_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when execution completed.

execution_status.description: The outcome of the execution attempt.

target_result.description: The result returned by the target system after execution. Structure is action_type-specific.

execution_token_id.description: A one-time token or nonce issued by the authorization layer that was consumed during execution. Proves that this execution was authorized by the gate and that the token cannot be reused.

error_detail.description: If execution_status is failed or partial, a human-readable description of what went wrong.
